tagline: From scattered legal datasets to golden records in 6 steps

steps.title: Ingest Datasets
steps.body: Select contracts, matters, billing, or regulatory exports from catalog or upload CSV, JSON, and XLSX without upfront transformation.

steps.title: Semantic Discovery
steps.body: LLM-generated metadata describes each dataset and column so downstream clustering understands business meaning, not just headers.

steps.title: Cluster Related Sources
steps.body: Group datasets that represent the same business concept using semantic comparison and leader–follower clustering.

steps.title: Diagnose & Resolve
steps.body: LLM agents flag type mismatches and bad mappings; humans accept fixes and define rules in the resolution step.
steps.visualContent: Issue list with severity + HITL review.

steps.title: Golden Record Fusion
steps.body: Proposed Golden Schema per cluster merges columns with conflict logs and full lineage for chatbot-ready harmonized data.
